channel.title: Private Registries on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Private Registries on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Dependabot no longer infers .npmrc
item.description:
Dependabot no longer infers .npmrc settings for npm private registries. Instead of reconstructing .npmrc from lockfile URLs, it will stop trying to guess configuration based on potentially incorrect lockfile data.

  • Source: GitHub
